profile.name: Maximilian Grohmann
expertise: ARIA database SQL queries and reporting
Digitalization and interface design between departmental, clinical and hospital systems
Clinical networking, port releases, routing and protocol troubleshooting
DICOM, DICOM-RT, SMB and related clinical communication workflows

repositories.name: ESAPI_Showcase_ComplexScripts
repositories.description: Screenshots of my often used complex ESAPI-GUI-Scripts. These screenshots should inspire you for your own projects.

repositories.name: DICOM-RT-Station
repositories.description: A comprehensive DICOM RT (Radiation Therapy) plan management application with graphical user interface. This software enables receiving, organizing, and selectively forwarding DICOM RT plans to various DICOM nodes with automated rule-based forwarding capabilities.

repositories.name: Python_DICOM-RT-MetricExtractor
repositories.description: Process DICOM-RT files with a simple GUI to get specified metrics and a nice DVH plot

repositories.name: Kira_DICOM-RT-Anonymizer-MG
repositories.description: Anonymize DICOM-RT files with ease. UIDs are also anonymized but without losing RT connections.

repositories.name: ESAPI_Beam-Namer
repositories.description: BinaryPlugin_Simply change your Beam/Field IDs with the nomenclature of your choice.

repositories.name: Akki_Custom-Varian-Importer
repositories.description: Import Dicom files from many patients at once without even opening Eclipse.

repositories.name: ESAPI_DataMiner_PortalDosimetry
repositories.description: Standalone-Console-App_Mine all analysed PortalDosimetry Fields and make custom evaluations too

repositories.name: ESAPI_SRS-MultiMets-localMetrics
repositories.description: Simplified version of a ESAPI script to calculate local plan quality metrics for SRS cases with multiple lesions

repositories.name: Split-MultiFrame-DICOM
repositories.description: Split Enhanced Multi-Frame DICOM files into single-frame DICOMs. Simple Python script for Varian Eclipse TPS (≤v18) users. No Java/dcm4che required.
